title: Kella Rand, Reporting...

"'''Kella Rand, Reporting...'''" is a short story written by [[Laurie Burns]], originally published in the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 6|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 6]], in [[May]] [[1995]] by [[West End Games]]. It was republished in the online [[Fiction]] section of [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] on [[December 2]], [[2005]]. The online Hyperspace version is illustrated by [[Robert Duchlinski]].

==Plot summary==
[[Kella Rand]], a [[Journalist/Legends|reporter]] for the [[Galactic News Network]], is covering a vote over an alliance between the [[Indu San system/Legends|Indu San system]] and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Just before the vote on [[Indu San/Legends|Indu San]], Chief [[Councillor]] [[Shek Barayel]] is [[Death/Legends|killed]] in an [[Explosive charge/Legends|explosion]]. Kella, hoping for a big story, notices a [[Council Authority]] [[Authority Officer|Officer]] following the [[Aide/Legends|Ambassadorial Aide]] to [[Dictio L'varren]], [[Tev Aden]], into a corridor. Rand decides to follow, but is stopped by another Authority Officer. When a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] goes off in the hallway beyond, she and the guard investigate. There, they find Aden dead, shot by Officer [[Kaleb Darme]]. Rand glimpses Darme retrieving a detonator from Aden's body.

Back at the [[Indu GNN bureau]], Rand goes through several of her past interviews, and in the process, she notices a shot of Darme planting the [[Bomb/Legends|bomb]] that killed Barayel. She shows the other reporters—[[Crislyn]], [[Juloff]], and her boss, [[Robbe Nostler]]—then goes to share the evidence with Ambassador L'varren. On the way, a [[Sniper/Legends|sniper]] takes several pot-shots at her, but she manages to escape danger temporarily. Finally arriving at L'varren's hotel, she notices Juloff and Darme standing together and realizes that Juloff—still loyal to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]—tipped off Darme. She races to [[Suite 44-1]] and sends her [[Cam droid/Legends|hovercam]] ahead with the evidence. However, Darme manages to catch Rand before she can reach L'varren's suite. He pulls her into the [[Turbolift/Legends|turbolift]], threatens her with a [[Vibroknife/Legends|vibroknife]], takes her [[Datacard/Legends|datacards]], and shoots her with a stun bolt. In his escape from the turbolift, L'varren's people, having seen the evidence, catch Darme and rescue Rand. Rand, not wanting to miss the deadline, quickly rushes off to get her new story.
